messages.content: abbreviation for investment
inv.
abbreviation for attitude
att.

translate below朱董事长较为支持
戴董事长非常重视
马董事长和张少峰总会均知晓该项目
温总会已向汪董事长和李总初步汇报
集团领导和中移资本董事长均知晓本项目
集团总会冯总知晓本项目
吕董事长知晓本项目

Chairman Zhu is more supportive.
Chairman Dai attaches great importance to it.
Chairman Ma and General Manager Zhang are both aware of the project.
General Manager Wen has already given a preliminary report to Chairman Wang and President Li.
The group leaders and the chairman of China Mobile Capital are aware of this project.
General Manager Feng of the group is aware of this project.
Chairman Lv is aware of this project.
translate to 积极推进
proactively promoting/moving forward

translate to 已通过党委会、立项会，还差一个投决会
团队已向发展计划部主任万总汇报。下周初万总将向戴总和侯总汇报
杨林总已拜访章副主任
杨林总已拜访温总会
中移资本副总经理已拜访杨林总
分管副主任袁锐总已和中金电话会了解项目情况
3月份曾表示不参与战配

It has been approved by the party committee and the project approval meeting, and only the investment decision meeting is left.
The team has reported to Director Wan of the Development Planning Department. Next week, Director Wan will report to Chairman Dai and Chairman Hou.
General Manager Yang Lin has visited Vice Chairman Zhang.
General Manager Yang Lin has visited General Manager Wen.
The Deputy General Manager of China Mobile Capital has visited General Manager Yang Lin.
The Deputy Director in charge, Yuan Rui, has had a phone call with Zhongjin to understand the project.
It was previously stated in March that there would be no participation in the battle coordination.

translate to "关注1）如果发生极端地缘风险，对先正达的影响和我们的应对策略；
2）中方对境外资产的控制力。"
关注未来分红政策、后市稳定措施
关注其他央企决策情况
关注其他央企决策情况、未来潜在商誉减值、后市稳定措施
关注业务合作角度、其他央企决策情况、后市稳定措施
关注业务合作角度、大规模发行对大盘的影响

"Pay attention to 1) the impact of extreme geopolitical risks on Xianzhongda and our response strategy; 
2) China's control over overseas assets."

"Pay attention to future dividend policies, post-market stability measures."

"Pay attention to other central enterprises' decision-making situations."

"Pay attention to other central enterprise decision-making situations, potential future impairment of goodwill, post-market stability measures."

"Pay attention to the perspective of business cooperation, other central enterprise decision-making situations, post-market stability measures."

"Pay attention to the perspective of business cooperation, the impact of large-scale issuance on the market."
translate 非常重视
Attach great importance to it.

translate 投行书面回复其关切问题，下周初安排国调基金调研天津MAP和研发中心，并安排双方集团高层会面
石油的决策对于石化和海油有带动作用，建议尽快推动其内部流程
下周择机安排杨林总和少峰总会面
跟踪石油和石化的动向，并协调国资委非主业投资的函
下周初安排中移资本调研天津MAP和研发中心。待中移资本向集团汇报后，安排集团领导见面
下周初栾主任出差回京，待袁副主任给栾主任汇报后，协调杨林总拜访栾主任
中金先重新询问其投资意向

"The investment bank will provide a written response to their concerns, and next week will arrange for GuoDiao Fund to visit Tianjin MAP and R&D center, as well as arrange for a high-level meeting between the two groups."

"The decisions of PetroChina have a driving effect on Sinopec and CNOOC. It is recommended to push forward their internal processes as soon as possible."

"Next week, arrange for General Manager Yang Lin and General Manager Zhang Shao-Feng to meet at the appropriate time."

"Track the trends of PetroChina and Sinopec and coordinate with SASAC on non-core investments."

"Next week, arrange for China Mobile Capital to visit Tianjin MAP and R&D center. After China Mobile Capital reports to the group, arrange for a meeting with the group leaders."

"Director Luan will be back in Beijing on a business trip next week. After Deputy Director Yuan reports to Director Luan, coordinate with General Manager Yang Lin to visit Director Luan."

"Zhongjin will inquire about its investment intentions again."

translate 给诚通集团发送拜访函，凡荣总拜访朱总，敲定投资金额
请凡荣总周一前给戴总或侯总打电话或发信息，恳请加快推动内部决策
根据推进进展再确定
建议在过会后请凡荣总和汪总打电话或者发信息
待下周中移资本内部汇报后，根据推进进展再确定
根据推进进展再确定
根据推进进展再确定

"Send a visiting letter to Chengtong Group, and arrange for Fan Rong to visit Chairman Zhu to finalize the investment amount."

"Please have Fan Rong contact Chairman Dai or Chairman Hou by phone or message before Monday, and earnestly request to accelerate the internal decision-making process."

"To be determined based on the progress of the advancement."

"Recommend that Fan Rong and President Wang call or text after the meeting."

"To be determined based on the internal report of China Mobile Capital next week."

"To be determined based on the progress of the advancement."

"To be determined based on the progress of the advancement."
请问下tiktok的业务发展情况
很抱歉，作为AI语言模型，我无法查询最新的TikTok业务发展情况。需要获得最新的和细节更丰富的TikTok业务发展情况信息，建议查询相关新闻报道或者访问TikTok官方网站。
translate to 大型央企：普遍决策流程为1月内，部分为1.5月，但取决于集团高层沟通
Large central state-owned enterprises: The general decision-making process is within 1 month, some may take up to 1.5 months, but it depends on communication among the group leaders.
